decision: AGET-AGET is a personal power-user choice, not agent infrastructure

realization.wrong_model: Agents know about and report to AGET-AGET
realization.correct_model: User manually extracts patterns for AGET-AGET

for_agents.all_agents: Same experience as any public user's agents

for_user.workflow: Observe agents → Extract patterns → Document in AGET-AGET → Maybe share publicly
for_user.benefit: Living the real user experience reveals real patterns

for_aget_aget.value: Private space for reflection and pattern extraction

corrected_messaging.to_agents: You were built from aget-cli-agent-template. Contribute patterns there via PRs.
corrected_messaging.to_self: AGET-AGET is my personal lab for extracting patterns from agent usage
corrected_messaging.to_public: AGET-AGET doesn't exist in the public narrative

benefits.portability: Agents work anywhere without special knowledge

philosophy: AGET-AGET is a notebook, not infrastructure
